input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B6-binary-representation-minimization
Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

Question:
For each n, let k(n) be the number of ones in the binary representation of 2023*n.
Find the minimum k(n).

Grading target:
Exact numerical match.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

Question ID: architecture-derived-B6-binary-representation-minimization
Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

  "decision_notes": "The problem asks for the minimum number of set bits in the binary representation of 2023*n for any positive integer n. This is equivalent to finding the minimum Hamming weight of multiples of 2023. Since 2023 is odd, we are looking for the minimum number of ones in a multiple of 2023.
